prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime-style action illustration of an elegant white-haired female adventurer stepping down toward the viewer from a jagged dark rock ledge, seen from an extreme low-angle worm’s-eye perspective with a wide lens. She has very long flowing silver-white hair blown strongly to the left, pale skin, and a confident fashion-model/action-hero pose; obscure or simplify the facial features so the face is not the focus. Outfit: futuristic white expedition/tactical clothing with exactly 6 main visible outfit elements: a cropped white fitted top, a white oversized technical jacket, loose white cargo pants, black gloves, heavy white lace-up combat boots, and black harness straps with gold chain and dangling utility cords. Her front boot dominates the lower center foreground on the rock, one knee is raised high, her right arm reaches outward toward the viewer with spread gloved fingers, and her other arm trails back. Surround her with a spectacular explosion of translucent crystal and glass shards, with exactly 3 shard groups: large faceted crystal slabs behind her on the upper right, dozens of medium floating shards radiating around her body, and sparkling fine splinters and dust encircling the legs and boots. Use a bright icy palette of white, silver, pale gray, transparent blue highlights, black strap accents, and small gold hardware details. Lighting should be high-key and cinematic, with intense backlight, rim light through the hair, glittering specular reflections on every shard, and a clean pale gray-white background. Ultra-detailed anime rendering, crisp linework blended with painterly realism, dynamic motion, wind-swept hair, fabric folds, scuffed boot sole texture, shallow depth of field, sparkling particles, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
